basic_details.job_title: APTRANSCO AEE Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 200 Assistant Executive Engineer Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Transmission Corporation of Andhra Pradesh Limited (APTRANSCO)
basic_details.short_information: The Transmission Corporation of Andhra Pradesh Limited (APTRANSCO) has officially released the APTRANSCO AEE Recruitment 2026 notification (RO.No.GMCC/APTRANSCO/85/26-27, dated 25 June 2026) for 200 Assistant Executive Engineer vacancies across Electrical, Civil, and Telecom disciplines. Eligible engineering graduates aged 18 to 42 years can apply online from 30 June 2026 to 20 July 2026. Selected candidates will receive a consolidated monthly remuneration of ₹75,000 during the probation period.

important_dates.objection window: Within 7 days of initial key release
important_dates.merit list announcement: 7 days after final key (tentatively last week of September 2026)

application_fee.details: The application fee for APTRANSCO AEE Apply Online 2026 is ₹1,000 for all candidates, payable through the online payment gateway between 30 June 2026 and 20 July 2026. Once paid, the system generates a Journal Number confirming fee receipt - but this does not mean the application is complete. Candidates must finish the full online application after receiving the Journal Number. Fees once paid are non-refundable under any circumstances.

age_limit.details: Category Minimum Age Maximum Age General / OC 18 years 42 years SC / ST / BC / EWS 18 years 47 years Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) 18 years 52 years

qualification.details: Candidates wondering whether they are eligible for the APTRANSCO Assistant Executive Engineer Recruitment 2026 should check both the educational qualification and age criteria carefully before paying the application fee. All qualifications must be completed and certificates must be in hand on or before the date of notification (25 June 2026). Degrees awarded under Distance Mode through study centers by universities outside Andhra Pradesh are not valid for this recruitment.

salary_details.details: One of the most searched queries around APTRANSCO AEE Recruitment 2026 is the salary structure. During the 2-year probation period (within a continuous period of 3 years), selected candidates receive a fixed consolidated remuneration of ₹75,000 per month. After successful completion of probation, they are placed on the regular pay scale under RPS-2022. | Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

selection_process: The APTRANSCO AEE selection process for 2026 is entirely merit-based

conducted through a Computer Based Test (CBT) with no scope for external recommendations. Any attempt to influence the process results in permanent disqualification. The full process from CBT to appointment involves four clear stages.
Step 1 - Computer Based Test (CBT) The CBT is scheduled from 22 to 29 August 2026 with a duration of 3 hours and a total of 100 marks. The test is conducted in English only
at designated centres across 52 cities in Andhra Pradesh and neighbouring states including Hyderabad
Step 2 - Normalization Since the CBT is conducted in multiple shifts
a standard normalization formula is applied to ensure fairness across different sets. Normalized marks (calculated up to 5 decimal places) are used for merit ranking.
Step 3 - Merit List Preparation The merit list is prepared in a 1:1 ratio against notified vacancies
strictly following the Rule of Reservation and zone-wise local candidature norms. Tie-breaking is done first by age (older candidate ranked higher)
then by the date of acquiring the educational qualification.

Step 4 - Certificate Verification Candidates in the 1:1 merit list are called for verification of original documents. Candidates who fail to produce valid certificates or are found ineligible are disqualified
and the next candidate in the merit list is considered.
Step 5 - Final Selection and Appointment The final selection list is published on the official website. Appointment orders are issued subject to character verification
and fulfillment of all eligibility conditions.

exam_pattern.details: Note: There is no negative marking in the CBT.

how_to_apply: The APTRANSCO AEE Apply Online 2026 process is fully online and must be completed through either the official APTRANSCO website or the Common Recruitment Portal before 20 July 2026. No offline applications are accepted. Candidates who submit applications through any mode other than online will be summarily rejected.
Click on the APTRANSCO Recruitment 2026 application link (active from 30 June 2026)
Complete registration using your Aadhaar-linked mobile number - an OTP will be sent to this number
Pay the application fee of ₹1,000 via the online payment gateway and note your Journal Number
Log in using the credentials received after registration
Fill in all required fields - educational qualifications, personal details, zone preferences, utility preferences
Upload scanned copies of required documents (photo, signature, qualification certificates, community certificate, etc.)
Enter your zone and utility preferences - these are final and cannot be changed after submission
Submit the application and save or print the confirmation for your records
Candidates already in government service must upload a No Objection Certificate from their current employer.

content_sections.heading: APTRANSCO AEE Notification 2026 PDF Download
content_sections.text: The official APTRANSCO AEE Notification 2026 PDF has been released on 25 June 2026 and is available on the official recruitment portal. Candidates are strongly advised to download and read the full notification before applying, as it contains zone-wise vacancy breakdowns, syllabus details, bond conditions, and disqualification clauses. The APTRANSCO AEE Recruitment 2026 official notification PDF can be downloaded from the links provided in the Important Links section below. Download APSPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Apply APSPDCL AEE Recruitment 2026 Here (active on 30 June 2026)

rows.information: Transmission Corporation of Andhra Pradesh Limited (APTRANSCO)

content_sections.heading: Important Dates for APTRANSCO Assistant Executive Engineer Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Every candidate planning to apply for the APTRANSCO AEE Bharti 2026 should note these key dates carefully. Missing any deadline means automatic disqualification, as no extensions are ordinarily granted. The online application window is open for exactly 21 days, from 30 June to 20 July 2026.

rows.event: Last Date to Apply Online & Pay Fee

rows.date: Within 7 days of initial key release
7 days after final key (tentatively last week of September 2026)

content_sections.heading: APTRANSCO AEE Vacancy 2026 - Post-wise and Zone-wise Breakdown
content_sections.text: The APTRANSCO AEE Vacancy 2026 covers 200 total posts spread across three engineering disciplines and six zones in Andhra Pradesh. The vacancies are provisional and may increase or decrease based on administrative requirements. Candidates should note that 95% of vacancies in each zone are reserved for local candidates, with only 5% open to non-locals.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for APTRANSCO AEE Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates wondering whether they are eligible for the APTRANSCO Assistant Executive Engineer Recruitment 2026 should check both the educational qualification and age criteria carefully before paying the application fee. All qualifications must be completed and certificates must be in hand on or before the date of notification (25 June 2026) . Degrees awarded under Distance Mode through study centers by universities outside Andhra Pradesh are not valid for this recruitment.

rows.required_degree: B.E. / B.Tech in Electrical Engineering or Electrical & Electronics Engineering from a recognised university (AICTE-approved, UGC-recognised)
B.E. / B.Tech in Telecommunications / Electronics / Electronics & Communication Engineering from a recognised university
B.E. / B.Tech in Civil Engineering from a recognised university

content_sections.heading: Application Fee - APTRANSCO AEE Apply Online 2026
content_sections.text: The application fee for APTRANSCO AEE Apply Online 2026 is ₹1,000 for all candidates , payable through the online payment gateway between 30 June 2026 and 20 July 2026. Once paid, the system generates a Journal Number confirming fee receipt - but this does not mean the application is complete. Candidates must finish the full online application after receiving the Journal Number. Fees once paid are non-refundable under any circumstances.

content_sections.heading: Salary and Pay Scale - APTRANSCO AEE 2026
content_sections.text: One of the most searched queries around APTRANSCO AEE Recruitment 2026 is the salary structure. During the 2-year probation period (within a continuous period of 3 years), selected candidates receive a fixed consolidated remuneration of ₹75,000 per month . After successful completion of probation, they are placed on the regular pay scale under RPS-2022. Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

content_sections.heading: Selection Process - APTRANSCO AEE Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The APTRANSCO AEE selection process for 2026 is entirely merit-based, conducted through a Computer Based Test (CBT) with no scope for external recommendations. Any attempt to influence the process results in permanent disqualification . The full process from CBT to appointment involves four clear stages. Step 1 - Computer Based Test (CBT) The CBT is scheduled from 22 to 29 August 2026 with a duration of 3 hours and a total of 100 marks . The test is conducted in English only, at designated centres across 52 cities in Andhra Pradesh and neighbouring states including Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Chennai, and Berhampur. Step 2 - Normalization Since the CBT is conducted in multiple shifts, a standard normalization formula is applied to ensure fairness across different sets. Normalized marks (calculated up to 5 decimal places) are used for merit ranking. Step 3 - Merit List Preparation The merit list is prepared in a 1:1 ratio against notified vacancies, strictly following the Rule of Reservation and zone-wise local candidature norms. Tie-breaking is done first by age (older candidate ranked higher), then by the date of acquiring the educational qualification. Step 4 - Certificate Verification Candidates in the 1:1 merit list are called for verification of original documents. Candidates who fail to produce valid certificates or are found ineligible are disqualified, and the next candidate in the merit list is considered. Step 5 - Final Selection and Appointment The final selection list is published on the official website. Appointment orders are issued subject to character verification, physical fitness, and fulfillment of all eligibility conditions.

content_sections.heading: Exam Pattern - Marks Distribution
content_sections.text: Note: There is no negative marking in the CBT.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply Online - APTRANSCO AEE Bharti 2026
content_sections.text: The APTRANSCO AEE Apply Online 2026 process is fully online and must be completed through either the official APTRANSCO website or the Common Recruitment Portal before 20 July 2026. No offline applications are accepted. Candidates who submit applications through any mode other than online will be summarily rejected. Step-by-step application process: Visit https://aptransco.gov.in or https://apvidyutrecruitment.apcfss.in Click on the APTRANSCO Recruitment 2026 application link (active from 30 June 2026) Complete registration using your Aadhaar-linked mobile number - an OTP will be sent to this number Pay the application fee of ₹1,000 via the online payment gateway and note your Journal Number Log in using the credentials received after registration Fill in all required fields - educational qualifications, personal details, zone preferences, utility preferences Upload scanned copies of required documents (photo, signature, qualification certificates, community certificate, etc.) Enter your zone and utility preferences - these are final and cannot be changed after submission Submit the application and save or print the confirmation for your records Candidates already in government service must upload a No Objection Certificate from their current employer.

content_sections.heading: Bond Conditions and Document Deposit
content_sections.text: Candidates selected through APTRANSCO AEE Recruitment 2026 must be aware of the bond obligations before applying. Every appointed candidate must execute a Service Bond on Non-Judicial Stamp Paper worth ₹110 at the time of joining. The total bond period is 7 years - comprising 2 years of probation plus 5 years of service. During the 7-year bond period, original certificates (degree, date of birth, community) must be deposited with APTRANSCO and will not be returned. If an employee needs their certificates for any bonafide purpose during this period, they must deposit ₹1,00,000 as security before the certificates are temporarily released. Appointed candidates are required to work in field postings (Meter & Relay Testing, Line Maintenance, Sub-station Maintenance, or Construction Divisions) - preferably in rural or remote areas - for a minimum of 5 years from the date of appointment . No transfer requests to office or headquarters will be entertained during this period.

rows.amount: Refund of all emoluments received + ₹5,00,000 as liquidated damages

content_sections.heading: Troubleshooting and Common Mistakes to Avoid
content_sections.text: Many candidates make avoidable errors during the APTRANSCO AEE Application 2026 process that lead to rejection at later stages. Being aware of these pitfalls in advance can save significant effort and money. Paying fee without reading eligibility: The application fee is non-refundable. Confirm that you hold the exact qualifying degree before paying ₹1,000. Using a non-Aadhaar-linked mobile number: Registration requires OTP verification to your Aadhaar-linked number. Candidates whose mobile numbers are not linked to Aadhaar must get them linked before 30 June 2026. Uploading unclear documents: Illegible or tampered documents cause application rejection. Scan all certificates at high resolution before uploading. Leaving fields blank: No field in the application form should be left blank - incomplete applications are rejected outright. Changing zone/utility preferences after submission: The preferences entered during application are final. There is no provision to edit them after submission. Claiming equivalency without a certificate: If your degree is not identical to the prescribed qualification, an Equivalency Certificate from the Registrar of your university is mandatory. Do not apply without it. Submitting EWS certificate older than one year: The EWS Income Certificate must be issued within one year prior to the notification date (i.e., after 25 June 2025). Trying to influence postings after selection: APTRANSCO maintains a confidential register of all external recommendations. Any attempt to influence postings through political or other means results in dismissal and permanent debarment.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for APTRANSCO AEE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online and pay the application fee for APTRANSCO AEE Recruitment 2026 is 20 July 2026 at 11:59 PM. No applications will be accepted after this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many total vacancies are notified in APTRANSCO AEE Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: APTRANSCO has notified 200 total vacancies - 167 for AEE/Electrical, 23 for AEE/Civil, and 10 for AEE/Telecom — through this recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for APTRANSCO Assistant Executive Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 and 42 years of age as on 01 July 2026. SC/ST/BC/EWS candidates get a relaxation up to 47 years, and PwBD candidates up to 52 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for APTRANSCO AEE Apply Online 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹1,000 for all candidates, payable online through the payment gateway. The fee is non-refundable once paid.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for APTRANSCO AEE 2026 selected candidates?
faq.answer: During the probation period, selected candidates receive ₹75,000 per month as consolidated remuneration. After probation, they are placed on the regular RPS-2022 pay scale starting at ₹86,245.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for APTRANSCO AEE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on a Computer Based Test (CBT) of 100 marks, followed by certificate verification and final selection. There is no interview. Marks are normalized across multiple exam shifts.

faq.question: Q7. When is the APTRANSCO AEE CBT exam scheduled?
faq.answer: The Computer Based Test is scheduled from 22 August 2026 to 29 August 2026. Hall tickets will be available for download 7 days before the exam begins.

faq.question: Q8. Is there negative marking in the APTRANSCO AEE 2026 exam?
faq.answer: No. There is no negative marking in the APTRANSCO AEE Computer Based Test 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are needed to apply for APTRANSCO AEE 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must upload a recent passport photo, scanned signature, educational qualification certificates, community/caste certificate (if applicable), EWS certificate (if applicable), PwBD SADAREM certificate (if applicable), and study/residence certificates for local candidature claims.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the APTRANSCO AEE Notification 2026 PDF?
faq.answer: The official APTRANSCO AEE Notification 2026 PDF is available for download at https://aptransco.gov.in and https://apvidyutrecruitment.apcfss.in from 25 June 2026 onwards.
